name: Tamales Tolimenses In La Puerta Falsa
snippet:
The tamales , a Bogota speciality of rice, chicken, pork, egg and vegetables wrapped in a palm leaf, are an excellent kick-start to a day. Read more

name: La Puerta Falsa : Bogotá
snippet:
